[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a first-person view inside a voxel-based game area during rainfall, with a large stone structure, scattered blocks, trees, and an on-screen stats menu.

Main Subject:
The main focus is the player’s first-person viewpoint looking down a long green corridor of blocky grass and stone paths, with a Minecraft-like heads-up display including a health bar, hunger/status icons, a hotbar of items, and a right-side panel listing profile and server information.

Setting:
The scene is outdoors in a blocky, game-like environment with rain falling diagonally through a dark sky. The ground is made of square, tiled stone and grass blocks, with green trees and tall vertical rows of block-like vines or plants. In the distance there are multiple floating or scattered block items and structures, and several red-and-white objects appear among the debris.

Visual Details:
The lighting is dim and bluish, consistent with nighttime or stormy conditions. The camera angle is slightly downward and wide, showing a corridor that narrows into the distance. On the left foreground, a blocky character-like figure in brown and tan clothing or armor is partially visible, occupying the lower-left corner. Near the center foreground, there is a small white blocky animal or entity and a name label above another small figure; both are surrounded by rain and scattered red particles or objects. The hotbar at the bottom contains multiple small square icons, including tools and an item that looks like a pickaxe or similar implement, along with a water-bottle-like icon and other miscellaneous items. A rectangular chat or log-style message block appears on a brick-like wall in the left middle distance, with lines of white text and red-highlighted sections. On the right side, a vertical panel shows the current profile and server details in white, yellow, and red text, with a small button-like element labeled “MEENIER” inside it. At the top center, there are several small square UI buttons (icons) arranged horizontally.

Visible Text:
POSITION: -17,118,-866
STELLARISE SMP
PROFILES

No other important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
A first-person, block-based game scene shows rain falling over a large stone-and-grass area with trees, scattered blocks, and UI elements. A right-side menu displays profile and server statistics while the bottom hotbar shows available items.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
